description: Compromise of embedded IoT device via firmware vulnerabilities and default credential exploitation.

IF-01.label: target_reachable_and_responsive
IF-01.description: Target system or service responds to network probes; collection or exploitation is feasible.
IF-01.evidence_hint: TCP connect or ICMP probe confirms reachability; confirm via port scan or HTTP HEAD request

IF-02.label: target_service_exposed
IF-02.description: Target service is listening on a reachable port and accepting connections.
IF-02.evidence_hint: Service banner grab or HTTP 200/401 response confirms service is listening

IF-03.label: busybox_memory_corruption_exploitable
IF-03.description: Buffer overflow via unchecked memory operation (CVE-2016-2148, CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL)
IF-03.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-04.label: busybox_critical_vuln_present
IF-04.description: BusyBox project BusyBox wget version prior to commit 8e2174e9bd836e53c8b9c6e00d1bc6e2a718686e contains a Buffer Overflow vulnerability in Busybox wget that can result in heap buffer overflow. (CVE-2018-1000517, CVSS 9.8)
IF-04.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-05.label: dropbear_hardcoded_credential_present
IF-05.description: Hardcoded credential present in software (CVE-2020-15833, CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL)
IF-05.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-06.label: openssl_arbitrary_code_execution_possible
IF-06.description: Double free vulnerability in OpenSSL 0.9.7 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via an SSL client certificate with a certain invalid ASN.1 e (CVE-2003-0545, CVSS 9.8)
IF-06.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-07.label: dnsmasq_out_of_bounds_write_exploitable
IF-07.description: Out-of-bounds write via malformed input (CVE-2017-14491, CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL)
IF-07.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-08.label: busybox_code_injection_exploitable
IF-08.description: Code injection via unsafe deserialization or eval (CVE-2017-16544, CVSS 8.8 HIGH)
IF-08.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; requires low privilege user present

IF-09.label: dropbear_remote_code_execution_possible
IF-09.description: The server in Dropbear before 2017.75 might allow post-authentication root remote code execution because of a double free in cleanup of TCP listeners when the -a option is enabled. (CVE-2017-9078, CVSS 8.8)
IF-09.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; requires low privilege user present

IF-10.label: curl_arbitrary_code_execution_possible
IF-10.description: Multiple stack-based buffer overflows in libcURL and cURL 7.12.1, and possibly other versions, allow remote malicious web servers to execute arbitrary code via base64 encoded replies that exceed the i (CVE-2005-0490, CVSS 8.8)
IF-10.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; requires low privilege user present

IF-11.label: busybox_arbitrary_code_execution_possible
IF-11.description: Busybox contains a Missing SSL certificate validation vulnerability in The "busybox wget" applet that can result in arbitrary code execution. (CVE-2018-1000500, CVSS 8.1)
IF-11.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-12.label: busybox_insecure_default_permissions
IF-12.description: Incorrect default permissions on file or directory (CVE-2017-3209, CVSS 8.1 HIGH)
IF-12.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-13.label: busybox_denial_of_service_possible
IF-13.description: The recv_and_process_client_pkt function in networking/ntpd.c in busybox allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU and bandwidth consumption) via a forged NTP packet, which triggers a  (CVE-2016-6301, CVSS 7.5)
IF-13.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-14.label: busybox_integer_overflow_exploitable
IF-14.description: Integer overflow leading to memory corruption (CVE-2016-2147, CVSS 7.5 HIGH)
IF-14.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

IF-15.label: busybox_path_traversal_exploitable
IF-15.description: Directory traversal vulnerability in the BusyBox implementation of tar before 1.22.0 v5 allows remote attackers to point to files outside the current working directory via a symlink. (CVE-2011-5325, CVSS 7.5)
IF-15.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

iot_firmware_network_exploit_v1.description: Remote exploitation via network-accessible vulnerability in iot_firmware environment.

iot_firmware_local_exploit_v1.description: Local exploitation of iot_firmware environment requiring initial access.

iot_firmware_full_chain_v1.description: Full exploitation chain: remote access through local privilege escalation in iot_firmware.
